languages.text: "Беседа прекращена ввиду невежественности собеседника, недопустимой при обсуждении даров Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "Беседа прекращена ввиду невежественности собеседника, недопустимой при обсуждении даров Омниссии".
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such benightedness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Беседа прекращена ввиду невежественности собеседника, недопустимой при обсуждении даров Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such lack of awareness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."
traits.speaker: PascalCompanion

languages.text: "Das Gespräch wurde aufgrund der Unwissenheit des Gesprächspartners abgebrochen. Eine solche Unwissenheit ist in einer Diskussion über die Gaben des Allmächtigen nicht hinnehmbar."
languages.original_text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such benightedness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Das Gespräch wurde aufgrund der Unwissenheit des Gesprächspartners abgebrochen. Eine solche Unwissenheit ist in einer Diskussion über die Gaben des Allmächtigen nicht hinnehmbar."

languages.text: "La conversation a été interrompue en raison de l'ignorance de l'interlocuteur. Une telle ignorance est inacceptable dans une discussion sur les dons de l'Omniscience."
languages.original_text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such benightedness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "La conversation a été interrompue en raison de l'ignorance de l'interlocuteur. Une telle ignorance est inacceptable dans une discussion sur les dons de l'Omniscience."

languages.text: "La conversación se ha dado por terminada debido a la ignorancia del interlocutor. Semejante incultura es inaceptable en una discusión sobre los dones del Omnissiah".
languages.original_text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such benightedness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "La conversación se ha dado por terminada debido a la ignorancia del interlocutor. Semejante incultura es inaceptable en una discusión sobre los dones del Omnissiah".

languages.text: "Konuşma, muhatabın cehaleti nedeniyle sonlandırılmıştır. Böyle bir cehalet, Tanrı'nın lütufları hakkındaki bir tartışmada kabul edilemez."
languages.original_text: "The conversation has been terminated due to the interlocutor's ignorance. Such benightedness is unacceptable in a discussion about the gifts of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Konuşma, muhatabın cehaleti nedeniyle sonlandırılmıştır. Böyle bir cehalet, Tanrı'nın lütufları hakkındaki bir tartışmada kabul edilemez."
